skill_inventory.name: bash
skill_inventory.description: Execute a single shell command inside the agent's workspace. Returns stdout + stderr + exit code.

skill_inventory.name: edit_file
skill_inventory.description: Make a precise string replacement in a file. Use for modifying existing code or text.

skill_inventory.name: example_skill
skill_inventory.description: Example skill demonstrating skill JSON schema. Not for production use.

skill_inventory.name: grep_search
skill_inventory.description: Search for patterns in files using regex. Returns matching lines with context.

skill_inventory.name: list_dir
skill_inventory.description: List directory contents with optional filtering. Shows files, dirs, and metadata.

skill_inventory.name: read_file
skill_inventory.description: Read the contents of a file. Supports offset and limit for large files.

skill_inventory.name: read_multiple_files
skill_inventory.description: Read multiple files in a single call. Efficient for gathering related code.

skill_inventory.name: write_file
skill_inventory.description: Write content to a file. Creates new files or overwrites existing ones.
